name: Yukidarumon

signature_move.name: Zettai Reido Punch
signature_move.description: 12A punch that freezes the enemy solid.Fires a burst of freezing air by punching.

description: An Ice-snow Digimon whose body is covered in snow and ice crystals. Contrary to its cold appearance, it has a very warm, gentle personality. As a Digimon that melts the hearts of those who see it with its calm movements and sweet behavior, Yukidarumon hates fighting by nature. Among the battle-loving Digimon, it dreads Meramon in particular. Its Special Move is " Zettai Reido Punch ", which it fires from its large body.
